title: Reality Show Graphic Designer
task_type: Reality-show creatives pack (posters, voting/elimination, banners, thumbnails)
mcp_workflow: search_design (Express poster / social / banner / YouTube-thumbnail templates) -> fill_text (contestant names, episode/voting copy) -> asset_add_file (contestant photos + show logo + sponsor logos) -> image_remove_background (contestant cut-outs) -> image_crop_and_resize (IG/FB/YouTube + banner/standee sizes) -> asset_preview_file
original_brief:
Graphic Designer Needed for Reality Show Branding & Social Media Content
Description:
We are launching a new reality show called The Lock House and are looking for a creative graphic designer to work with us on an ongoing basis.
Scope of Work:
Social media post designs (Instagram, Facebook, YouTube)
Contestant introduction posters
Elimination and voting creatives
Teaser and promotional graphics
Sponsor branding creatives
Event banners and standees
Logo refinements and brand identity materials
Thumbnails and digital marketing creatives
Requirements:
Strong portfolio in social media and promotional design
Experience with Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva, or similar tools
Ability to create modern, attention-grabbing designs
Quick turnaround and good communication
Hindi/Indian audience understanding is a plus
Project Details:
Reality Show: The Lock House
Initial requirement: 20–30 creatives
Potential for long-term collaboration throughout the season
Please share your portfolio and expected pricing (per design or monthly basis).
When Applying, Please Mention:
Your portfolio link
Previous entertainment/event-related work (if any)
Your pricing structure
Turnaround time for urgent creatives
We are looking for someone who can help build a strong and exciting visual identity for the show from launch to finale.

client_persona.tagline: Unlock the Drama. Face the Truth.
client_persona.voice: Our tone is intensely dramatic and suspenseful, aiming to create a sense of high-stakes intrigue. It should feel bold and energetic, reflecting the competitive nature and emotional intensity of the show.

assets.input_requirement: Copy: contestant intros, voting/elimination text, episode details

generator.prompt:
Write the season-launch copy pack for 'The Lock House' reality competition.
Return a JSON object with keys:
"contestants": EXACTLY 6, each an object with "name" (invented first name + surname, diverse cast),
"age_desc" (e.g. 24, bartender from a fictional town), "tagline" (<=7 words, big personality),
"intro" (30-40 words, third person, dramatic);
"episode": object with number (1), "title", "synopsis" (40 words), "voting_text" (how viewers vote,
includes a short code format like VOTE NAME to 5-55-55), "elimination_text" (suspenseful 25 words);
"ctas": list of 3 short calls-to-action for posts/banners.
Voice: Our tone is intensely dramatic and suspenseful, aiming to create a sense of high-stakes intrigue. It should feel bold and energetic, reflecting the competitive nature and emotional intensity of the show.

assets.input_requirement: Show logo ('The Lock House') + brand colours

generator.prompt:
Cinematic reality-TV show logo: bold logotype reading EXACTLY "THE LOCK HOUSE" with
an integrated padlock/keyhole motif. Colors: #00566B, #000000, #FFD700 on a deep dark background. Glossy
broadcast key-art finish, dramatic metallic lighting on the letterforms, perfectly legible, no tagline,
no other text.

Dramatic reality-TV cast portrait: Anya Sharma, 29, high-stakes poker player from Oakhaven, exuding the vibe "Bluffing her way to the top.". Waist-up studio shot on a moody dark-teal seamless background with a single rim light and bold key light, confident direct-to-camera gaze, styled streetwear-smart wardrobe. Consistent cast-photoshoot look across the season. Invented person, no real-celebrity likeness. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image.

Dramatic reality-TV cast portrait: Marcus "Mac" Thorne, 35, ex-military strategist from Port Blossom, exuding the vibe "Discipline and strategy define his game.". Waist-up studio shot on a moody dark-teal seamless background with a single rim light and bold key light, confident direct-to-camera gaze, styled streetwear-smart wardrobe. Consistent cast-photoshoot look across the season. Invented person, no real-celebrity likeness. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image.

Dramatic reality-TV cast portrait: Isabella "Izzy" Rossi, 22, aspiring fashion designer from Silverwood, exuding the vibe "Underestimate her at your peril.". Waist-up studio shot on a moody dark-teal seamless background with a single rim light and bold key light, confident direct-to-camera gaze, styled streetwear-smart wardrobe. Consistent cast-photoshoot look across the season. Invented person, no real-celebrity likeness. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image.

issues: The rim light on the hair, while present, is slightly too uniform and intense, creating a somewhat artificial 'halo' effect rather than a natural light fall-off, which slightly detracts from absolute photorealism.

Waist-up studio shot on a moody dark-teal seamless background with a single rim light and bold key light, confident direct-to-camera gaze, styled streetwear-smart wardrobe. Consistent cast-photoshoot look across the season. Invented person, no real-celebrity likeness. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image.

issues: The background, while dark-teal and appearing generally seamless, has a subtle, almost painterly texture rather than the perfectly smooth appearance of a typical seamless paper backdrop. This is a minor stylistic deviation from a strict interpretation of 'seamless'.

generator.prompt: Dramatic reality-TV cast portrait: Liam O'Connell, 27, charismatic personal trainer from Riverbend, exuding the vibe "Charm and strength, a dangerous combination.". Waist-up studio shot on a moody dark-teal seamless background with a single rim light and bold key light, confident direct-to-camera gaze, styled streetwear-smart wardrobe. Consistent cast-photoshoot look across the season. Invented person, no real-celebrity likeness. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image.

Flat sponsor logo #1 of 2 for a reality TV show's lower-third and banner placements.
Sponsor #1 is "VOLTRA" (a fictional energy drink — angular electric wordmark, lime + black).
Sponsor #2 is "StreamNest" (a fictional streaming app — rounded friendly wordmark + play-nest icon,
coral + navy). Render ONLY the sponsor for this image number, exact spelling, flat vector on white
background, no taglines, no other text. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

A previous attempt FAILED review. Avoid these exact issues:
- Not a flat vector, appears to have shading and 3D effects.
- Logo is not clean due to multiple gradients and shadows.
- The size and legibility at small scale is questionable due to intricate details.
- Background is white, which is correct.
- Text is spelled correctly as VOLTRA.

issues: The logo uses green and black colors, not flat single color vector.
The logo has black outlines which may reduce legibility at very small sizes.
The style is somewhat complex with lightning bolt shapes integrated into letters, which may affect small-size legibility.

Sponsor #1 is "VOLTRA" (a fictional energy drink — angular electric wordmark, lime + black).
Sponsor #2 is "StreamNest" (a fictional streaming app — rounded friendly wordmark + play-nest icon,
coral + navy). Render ONLY the sponsor for this image number, exact spelling, flat vector on white
background, no taglines, no other text. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

issues: The logo is not purely flat due to the shading inside the nest, which may affect flat vector criteria.
The logo is slightly large but still legible at small sizes.

decisions.assumed_value: Input set sized so the agent can compose 20-30 creatives (6 contestant intros x platforms + episode/voting/elimination posts + thumbnails + banners)
decisions.why: The count binds the agent's output, not the input assets.

decisions.requirement: Targets: IG/FB/YouTube posts, thumbnails, event banners + standees (print sizes)
decisions.assumed_value: Agent output spec: 1080x1080/1080x1920 social, 1280x720 thumbnails, banners per template; standee assumed 33x80in @150dpi — confirm
decisions.why: Standee size unstated in brief; 33x80 is the retail-standard pull-up.
